creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #11)
> It wasn't for devel/llvm39, before ports r421635 as in reference links in
> comment #0, because of Ninja build system usage
which also related to following comment:
(In reply to comment #7)
> - Hard to find a warning messages, especially for CMake based projects, like
> LLVM/Clang, where verbose build output disables colored output,
> one line build messages, with duplicate for warning messages.
where "one line build messages" is a feature of Ninja build system (in case of devel/llvm39), without verbose build output.
